Hero.subtitle: Sculptures of Light · Unique Editions
Hero.description1: High-end lighting pieces sculpted from ancient reclaimed wood.
Hero.description2: Timeless art and organic soul preserved in numbered pieces.

Values.v1_desc: Each work is delivered signed by the author with a physical document certifying its unique serial number and botanical species.
Values.v2_desc: We meticulously prepare high-protection technical packaging for each lamp, ensuring an impeccable presentation.
Values.v3_desc: The value of the work includes insured and priority shipping at no additional cost throughout the Peninsula.
